name: Strait of Hormuz
summary: Day 68 Wednesday. **PROJECT FREEDOM PAUSED MAY 5 — BUT IRAN'S BLOCKADE REMAINS 'IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT' (Trump's own Truth Social framing).** Within 24 hours of US convoy launch + kinetic exchange (6 Iranian fast boats sunk, 2 US destroyers transited successfully, SK HMM Namu damaged, UAE Fujairah hit), Trump paused the operation pending 'Complete and Final Agreement' via Pakistan. The Hormuz-territorial-control structure is now BIFURCATED: (1) US-Iran kinetic war probability declines (oil/defense/VIX falls), (2) physical chokepoint persists (Iranian closure of Hormuz unresolved; tanker rates still elevated; AWRP still ~1% baseline). This is the cleanest signal of MARKET BIFURCATION — Brent collapses (-4% May 5 → $107.96 May 6) on diplomatic-track pricing, while Frontline +2.8% / BOAT +3.5% rally on persistent physical disruption. The 'Brent <$115 sustained 5+ sessions' chain extended to Day 5/5 confirmed (Apr 30 $110.40 + May 1 $108.17 + May 4 $114.44 + May 5 $109.87 + May 6 $107.96, all <$115). Iran navigation map warning to US/oil tankers reissued Tue alongside Tehran's hardline Kayhan European-bases threat (RHETORIC, not operational). VLCC TD3C sustained ~$420-474K/day per Lloyd's List. AWRP at ~1% Hull&Mach (down from 2.5% peak); pause likely reduces re-spike risk (now lower probability of 5%+ within 5 sessions). New trigger reframed: AWRP normalization toward 0.5% within 10 sessions = pause priced as durable de-escalation; AWRP staying 0.8-1.5% = pause priced as fragile.

Physical-futures gap closes below $10/bbl (Dated Brent converges to Brent futures)

historical_summaries.summary: 12 signals. IRGC announced Hormuz closed to US, Israeli, and Western allied ships | Dallas Federal Reserve described closure as 'largest disruption to energy supply since the 1970s energy crisis' and 'largest in the history | Mojtaba Khamenei's first statement confirmed Hormuz would remain closed to pressure Iran's enemies

64 signals. WSJ paradigm shift CORROBORATED by CNN: 'Trump administration believes it will have to end Iran war with oil chokepoint still closed | Al-Salmi VLCC attacked at Dubai port anchorage — 31 nautical miles NW of Dubai, OUTSIDE Hormuz proper | CONFIRMED: Hormuz toll law passed FULL Majlis (not just committee)
